summary.initial_audit: art-room prompt file and supporting art assets were missing before this repair; package was generated from director-room asset prompt pack, shot list, continuity bible, and global asset index.
repair_actions: created missing episode art asset index, manifest, design JSON files, style continuity bible, thread plan, and art-image prompt package
generated production_metadata.reference_inputs from global parents, episode dependencies, costumes, props, locations, and style assets
kept production ids, source paths, usage, workflow labels, and shot codes out of model-visible prompt text
rebuilt all prompts with six model-visible sections and copy_ready reference image instructions
separated reusable 1:1/3:2 asset-card prompts from project-ratio vertical reference-frame prompts
added line-control, mask, and post-composite rules for exact text, symbols, registers, emblems, seals, blood records, jade marks, and relay tokens

checks.detail: model_visible_prompt has visible_goal/style_quality/subject_content/composition_motion/visible_continuity/negative_prompt
no prompt ids, episode ids, shot codes, source paths, workflow labels, approval language, placeholder labels, or asset paths in model-visible text
no English camera/template residue or malformed punctuation
production_metadata.reference_inputs resolves parent and dependency assets with lock usage
copy_ready contains copyable prompts plus reference image instructions without workflow residue or English leftovers
asset cards remain reusable cards; reference frames remain project-ratio foreground/midground/background video frames
text-like marks, symbols, registers, emblems, seals, and overlays use line control/mask/post-composite rules
subject and hard continuity are explicit enough to preserve story intent and inherited global locks
